examples: The kit comprises the following main components: phosphoenol pyruvate carboxylase, pyruvate dehydrogenase and a stabilizer.
Acetyl-CoA carboxylase 2 (D5B9) Rabbit mAb recognizes endogenous levels of total acetyl-CoA carboxylase 2 protein.
Treatment of AMPK-DN mice with adiponectin failed to phosphorylate cardiac acetyl-CoA carboxylase as it did in WT mouse heart.
